description: Generates Word documents (.docx) for the client Narrative Strategies using only the brand DNA — Montserrat fonts, the navy #103F72 palette, and the NARRATIVE logo — applied to a CLEAN, flexible layout built from scratch. Does NOT reproduce the official template's cover page, header/footer artwork, or fixed layout. Use when the user asks to "make a Narrative-branded Word doc", "apply Narrative Strategies branding to this", "use the Narrative fonts and colors", "NRTV brand styling without the template layout", "Narrative brand kit document", or wants a custom-layout doc that just carries the Narrative look. Do NOT use for the full official template with its cover image and exact layout — that is docx-nrtv-brand. Do NOT use for Synozur documents (use docx-synozur-brand) or non-Narrative work.
